---
output:
    html_document:
        css: styles_v7.css
        toc: true
        toc_float: true
            
params:
    patient_id:                 "default"
    cond_1:                     "default"
    cond_2:                     "default"
    date:                       "default"
    sid:                        "default"
    analysis_type:              "default"
    mm_type:                    "default"
    depth_stats:                "default"
    bam1_stats:                 "default"
    bam2_stats:                 "default"
    mm_tag_stats:               "default"
    histo_score:                "default"
    cmplot_pos:                 "default"
    cmplot_neg:                 "default"
    volcanoplot_region:         "default"
    barplot_region:             "default"
    volcanoplot_single:         "default"
    table_region:               "default"
    table_single:               "default"
    version_id:                 "default"
---

<style>
/* On cible les ID car RMarkdown les place sur des <div> pour les tabsets */
[id] {
  scroll-margin-top: 150px !important;
}

/* On cible aussi les titres h2 au cas où */
h2 {
  scroll-margin-top: 180px !important;
}


</style>

```{r bandeau, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

patient_id <- params$patient_id
cond_1 = params$cond_1
cond_2 = params$cond_2
date = params$date
sid = params$sid
analysis_type = params$analysis_type
mm_type = params$mm_type

cat(sprintf('
<div class="header-bandeau">

<div class="logo-bandeau">
<img src="Logo_D2MAP.gif" alt="Logo">
</div>

<div class="section-lightgrey_id">

<h1 style="margin: 0 0 5px 0; font-size: 2.5em;">
<strong>%s</strong>
<span style="margin-left: 30px;">%s vs %s</span>
</h1>


<h2 style="margin-top: 5px; font-size: 1.5em;">
<strong>%s</strong>
<span style="margin-left: 30px;"><strong>Analysis: %s&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  MM: %s</strong></span>
</h2>

<h3 style="margin-top: 5px; margin-bottom: 0;  font-size: 1em;">
<span class="session-text2"><em>Session ID: %s</em></span>
</h3>

</div>
</div>'
, patient_id, cond_1, cond_2, date, analysis_type, mm_type, sid))

```


<div class="custom-layout">

```{r navbar, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

cat(sprintf('
<nav class="custom-sidebar">
<div class="button-group">
<button class="nav-btn" onclick="document.getElementById(\'qcresults\').scrollIntoView({behavior: \'smooth\'})">
QC Results
</button>
<button class="nav-btn" onclick="document.getElementById(\'chapitre2\').scrollIntoView({behavior: \'smooth\'})">
DM Results
</button>
<button class="nav-btn" onclick="document.getElementById(\'chapitre3\').scrollIntoView({behavior: \'smooth\'})">
DM Tables
</button>
</div>

<footer class="sidebar-footer">
<p>&copy; %s - plateforme <strong>EpICO</strong></p>
<p style="display: inline;">contact:&nbsp;<em>fabien.gautier@univ-nantes.fr</em></p>
<p>G&eacute;n&eacute;r&eacute; le : %s</p>
</footer>
</nav>
', format(Sys.Date(), "%Y"), format(Sys.Date(), "%d/%m/%Y")))
```
<main class="custom-content">


## **QC Results** {.tabset #qcresults}


### **Sequencing Depth**
``` {r qc_results, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}

depth_stats_content = readLines(params$depth_stats)
formatted_stats = paste(depth_stats_content, collapse = "\n")
cat('<pre class="stats-box"><code>')
cat(paste(formatted_stats, collapse = "\n\n"))
cat('</code></pre>')
```
### **Reads Stats**
```{r reads_stats, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
bam1_content = readLines(params$bam1_stats)
bam2_content = readLines(params$bam2_stats)
cond_a = unlist(strsplit(params$bam1_stats, ".", fixed = T))[1]
cond_b = unlist(strsplit(params$bam2_stats, ".", fixed = T))[1]
cat('<pre class="stats-box"><code>')
cat(paste0("<strong>",cond_a, " :</strong>\n\n"))                                  # corriger pour actualiser le nom en fonction de l'input
cat(paste(bam1_content, collapse = "\n\n"))
cat("\n\n")
cat("=========================\n\n")                                   # idem
cat(paste0("<strong>",cond_b, " :</strong>\n\n"))                                  # corriger pour actualiser le nom en fonction de l'input
cat(paste(bam2_content, collapse = "\n\n"))
cat("\n\n")
cat('</code></pre>')
```

### **MM Tag Stats**
```{r mm_tag_stats, echo = F, results = "asis"}
mm_tag = readLines(params$mm_tag_stats)
cat('<pre class="stats-box"><code>')
cat(paste(mm_tag, collapse ="\n\n"))
cat('</code></pre>')
```

## {-}

<hr>


## **DM Analysis Results** {.tabset #chapitre2}

### **Regions** {.tabset}

#### **VolcanoPlots**
```{r volcano_plot_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<img src="', params$volcanoplot_region, '" width="65%"/>\n\n', sep ="")
```

#### **Features Barplots**
```{r features_barplot_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<img src="', params$barplot_region, '" width="65%" />\n\n', sep ="")
```

#### **CMPlots**
```{r cmplot_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<img src="', params$cmplot_pos, '" width="60%"/>\n\n',sep = "") # à mettre en symétrie
cat('<img src="', params$cmplot_neg, '" width="60%"/>\n\n',sep = "")
```

#### **DM Score**
```{r dm_score_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<img src="', params$histo_score, '" width="70%"/>\n\n', sep = "")
```

### {-}

### **Single** {.tabset}

#### **VolcanoPlots**
```{r volcano_single, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<img src="', params$volcanoplot_single, '" width="65%" />\n\n', sep ="")
```

#### **Features Barplots**
TBD

#### **CMPlots**
TBD

#### **DM Score**
TBD

### {-}

## {-}

<hr>




## **DM Tables** {.tabset #chapitre3}

### **Regions**
```{r table_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
library(openxlsx)
library(DT)

table_region =  read.xlsx(params$table_region)
cat('<div style="width: 100%; margin: auto;">')
datatable(table_region, options = list(scrollX = TRUE,
                                        autoWidth = TRUE), 
                    width = "100%")
cat('</div>')
```

### **Single**
```{r single_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
library(openxlsx)
library(DT)

table_region =  read.xlsx(params$table_single)
cat('<div style="width: 100%; margin: auto;">')
datatable(table_region, options = list(scrollX = TRUE,
                                        autoWidth = TRUE), 
                    width = "100%")
cat('</div>')
```

## {-}

<hr>

<div class="section-bleue">

<!-- TOOLS -->

## **Tools Version**
```{r tools_version, echo = F, results = "asis"}
version_id = readLines(params$version_id)
version_id_clean = version_id[version_id != '']
cat('<pre class="stats-box"><code>')
cat(paste(version_id_clean, collapse = " ; "))
cat('</code></pre>')
```
</div>


</main>


</div>
